## SCIM 2.0 Group Management

### `scim_v2__create_2`

```
POST /scim/v2/Groups
```

Create a new group

Create and retrieve a group resource.
It is possible to select or exlude attributes using `attributes` and `excludedAttributes` query parameters.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `attributes` | query | `string` | no |  |
| `excludedAttributes` | query | `string` | no |  |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `GroupResource`. Schema: `GroupResource`.


### `scim_v2__delete_2`

```
DELETE /scim/v2/Groups/{id}
```

Delete specific group

Delete a single group resource. The value of the {id} should be a UUID.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | path | `string` | yes |  |


### `scim_v2__get_2`

```
GET /scim/v2/Groups/{id}
```

Get specific group

Retrieve a single group resource. The value of the {id} should be a UUID.
It is possible to select or exlude attributes using `attributes` and `excludedAttributes` query parameters.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `attributes` | query | `string` | no |  |
| `excludedAttributes` | query | `string` | no |  |


### `scim_v2__getAll_2`

```
GET /scim/v2/Groups
```

Get groups

Returns a paginated list of groups, 100 user per page by default. `count` and `startIndex` parameters can be updated to get larger pages or to retrive other pages.

It is possible to use `filter` parameter to return a list of specific users (see [SCIMv2 specification](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7644#section-3.4.2.2) for details).

It is also possible to sort the results using the parameters `sortBy` and `sortOrder`. The attributes `attributes` and `excludedAttributes` can be set to select or exclude specific attributes.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `attributes` | query | `string` | no |  |
| `startIndex` | query | `integer` | no |  |
| `count` | query | `integer` | no |  |
| `sortOrder` | query | `string` | no |  |
| `sortBy` | query | `string` | no |  |
| `filter` | query | `string` | no |  |
| `excludedAttributes` | query | `string` | no |  |


### `scim_v2__patch_2`

```
PATCH /scim/v2/Groups/{id}
```

Update partially specific group

Update partially and retrieve a single group resource. The value of the {id} should be a UUID.
It is possible to select or exlude attributes using `attributes` and `excludedAttributes` query parameters.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `attributes` | query | `string` | no |  |
| `excludedAttributes` | query | `string` | no |  |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `PatchRequest`. Schema: `PatchRequest`.


### `scim_v2__search_2`

```
POST /scim/v2/Groups/.search
```

Search groups

Returns a paginated list of users, 100 user per page by default. `count` and `startIndex` parameters can be updated to get larger pages or to retrive other pages.

It is possible to use `filter` parameter to return a list of specific users (see [SCIMv2 specification](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7644#section-3.4.2.2) for details).

It is also possible to sort the results using the parameters `sortBy` and `sortOrder`. The attributes `attributes` and `excludedAttributes` can be set to select or exclude specific attributes.

_No path/query/header parameters._

**Request body** (`application/json`): `SearchRequest`. Schema: `SearchRequest`.


### `scim_v2__update_2`

```
PUT /scim/v2/Groups/{id}
```

Update specific group

Update and retrieve a single group resource. The value of the {id} should be a UUID.
It is possible to select or exlude attributes using `attributes` and `excludedAttributes` query parameters.

**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | path | `string` | yes |  |
| `attributes` | query | `string` | no |  |
| `excludedAttributes` | query | `string` | no |  |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `GroupResource`. Schema: `GroupResource`.


## SCIM 2.0 Resource Type

### `scim_v2__get_5`

```
GET /scim/v2/ResourceTypes/{id}
```

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

## SCIM 2.0 Service Provider Config

### `scim_v2__get_3`

```
GET /scim/v2/ServiceProviderConfig
```

Get Talend configuration

Returns Talend's configuration details for our SCIM API, including which operations are supported.

_No path/query/header parameters._
